A2: What Did You Do on

Source topic: Spring Vacation Conversation Lesson Create a practical English speaking lesson about the question: What did you do on...

Describe the weather

Continue The Conversation

Describe the weather

Continue as You.

Answer as yourself. Say what the weather was like.

Tip: Add one weather word and one small detail like morning or afternoon.

Show starter phrases
  • The weather was...
  • It was warm and...
  • In the morning, it was...
Show one model reply

The weather was warm in the afternoon, but the morning was cool.

More acceptable replies
  • It was sunny and a little windy.
  • It was rainy, so I stayed inside.

Check your understanding

?

How many nights did the travelers stay?

You can start like this: They stayed for...

Talk together

They add weather details to make the vacation answer sound more real.

What kind of weather do you like on vacation?

Start like this:The weather was...
